name_en: ❤️❤️Blue Denim 30 Montaigne East-West Chain Bag features an elegant design that elevates the style of the collection. Crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, it reimagines the classic Dior pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, showcasing modern charm. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Other details, such as the debossed 30 Montaigne logo on the back, highlight a clean style. It comes with a detachable chain shoulder strap with leather trim, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
